output.sparql:
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?monarchLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q480 wdt:P577 ?pubDate .
  ?monarch wdt:P39 wd:Q12473 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q30 .
  ?monarch p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q12473 ; pq:P580 ?start ; pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(?pubDate >= ?start && ?pubDate <= ?end)
  .
  ?monarch rdfs:label ?monarchLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?monarchLabel) = "en")
  .
}
